description: vLLM serving Qwen3.6-27B-AWQ on AMD R9700 (gfx1201), MTP×4, 234K ctx

panels.description: Generation token throughput (5m rate).

panels.description: End to end request latency measured in seconds.

panels.description: Number of tokens processed per second
panels.title: Token Throughput

panels.description: Inter token latency in seconds.

panels.description: Requests in RUNNING, WAITING, and SWAPPED scheduler states.

panels.description: P50, P90, P95, and P99 TTFT latency in seconds.
panels.title: Time To First Token Latency

panels.description: Percentage of KV cache blocks in use. High utilization increases preemption risk.

panels.description: Heatmap of request prompt length
panels.title: Request Prompt Length

panels.description: Heatmap of request generation length
panels.title: Request Generation Length

panels.description: Number of finished requests by their finish reason: either an EOS token was generated or the max sequence length was reached.
panels.title: Finish Reason
Queue Time
panels.description: Average time requests spend waiting in the scheduler queue.

panels.title: Requests Prefill and Decode Time
panels.description: Average prefill and decode time per request (seconds).

panels.title: Max Generation Token in Sequence Group
panels.description: Average max generation tokens per sequence group.

panels.title: MTP Acceptance Rate (spec decode)
panels.description: Fraction of MTP draft tokens accepted (MTP×4, target >0.7). Higher = faster single-stream decode.

panels.title: Prefix Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: Fraction of prefill tokens served from prefix cache. High hit rate = lower TTFT for repeated system prompts.
GPU utilization percent on the R9700 inference node.

panels.description: VRAM used vs total. The R9700 has 32 GiB.
